creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Can we use the release archive instead?
https://github.com/OpenPrinting/cups/releases/tag/v2.3.3op1 --> https://github.com/OpenPrinting/cups/releases/download/v2.3.3op1/cups-2.3.3op1-source.tar.gz

Several repos carries this patch, is this something we want to use too?
https://git.alpinelinux.org/aports/tree/main/cups/cups-no-export-ssllibs.patch

Best regards,
Daniel
